aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.description: Your reliable partner in steel construction
aboutUs.storyHeading: The Team That Turns Steel Into Structure
aboutUs.storyBody1: Stallcons is an Ankara-based steel construction firm. From structural design and fabrication to on-site installation and technical consulting, we manage every phase under one roof. We hold engineering precision, on-time delivery, and long-term reliability as non-negotiables on every project.
aboutUs.storyBody2: We serve across industrial facilities, defense structures, aviation hangars, and crane runway systems. With production aligned to international standards and an experienced engineering team, we are present at every stage of your project.
aboutUs.storyImageAlt: Stallcons engineering team in the field
aboutUs.value1Desc: On every project, structural calculations and analysis precede aesthetics. A correctly engineered structure performs for decades. Appearance is built on engineering, not the other way around.
aboutUs.value2Desc: One team manages the full scope, from design to installation. No coordination gaps, no lost contacts. The same team with the same accountability at every stage of your project.
aboutUs.value3Desc: Manufacturing in compliance with EN and ISO norms, with documented quality control throughout. Every weld is traceable, every component tested. Work without documentation does not ship.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Production and quality assurance at international standards
quality.introHeading: Quality Starts at the Drawing Board, Not at Delivery
quality.introBody1: We review every project's technical specification against EN 1090 and ISO 3834 requirements. From material receipt to the final weld on site, measurement, testing, and verification take place at every critical point.
quality.introBody2: Our quality control team works inside the production process, not separate from it. Every welding procedure is approved, every material certified, every component traceable. Work without documentation does not ship.
quality.pillar1Desc: Certified production under execution classes EXC 2 and EXC 3. Compliance with EN 1090 across the design, fabrication, and assembly of welded steel structures is documented and independently verified.
quality.pillar2Desc: Production under approved welding procedure specifications (WPS/pWPS), certified welders, and welding coordinator supervision. The full set of quality requirements for fusion welding of metallic materials is met.
quality.pillar3Desc: Certificate checks and heat number tracking for every incoming steel profile and plate. A complete traceability record from raw material to delivery is accessible at every project stage.
quality.pillar4Desc: Visual examination (VT), ultrasonic testing (UT), and radiographic testing (RT) on critical joints. Independent third-party audits and internal quality records are maintained in parallel.

missionVision.title: Mission & Vision
missionVision.description: The values that guide us on our journey to build the future
missionVision.missionStatement: To deliver steel construction projects from design to installation, on time, without compromising engineering integrity.
missionVision.missionBody: Stallcons treats every project as a technical commitment. From project start to handover, we maintain the same standards, the same documentation discipline, and the same accountability. When the client takes over, they find a complete engineering record behind the work.
missionVision.visionStatement: To become Turkey's preferred steel construction firm for international projects.
missionVision.visionBody: We aim to convert our domestic track record into international references. Our depth in defense and aviation, combined with our industrial construction expertise, will establish Stallcons as a globally recognized name in steel construction.
missionVision.principle1Desc: Technical decisions are made independently of commercial pressure. If the calculation validates the structure, we proceed. If it does not, the design is redone. That boundary is not open to negotiation.
missionVision.principle2Desc: Projects end; relationships continue. Post-delivery technical support, maintenance guidance, and priority response for additional needs — we remain available to our clients after handover.
missionVision.principle3Desc: Every project closes with a process review. Recurring issues enter the system; missed opportunities are recorded. Tracking what we do not yet know is as much a part of our quality policy as tracking what we do.

steelConstruction.title: Steel Construction
steelConstruction.description: End-to-end steel construction solutions from design to assembly
steelConstruction.galleryDescription:
We Build Tomorrow's Strong and Safe Structures with the Power of Steel

From heavy industrial structures to aesthetic steel designs, we bring every project to life by following global engineering standards and legal regulations. Every structure carrying the Stallcons signature is manufactured through demanding tests and quality processes.

Our Quality and Fabrication Standards:
• EN 1090 & CE Compliance: Traceable material usage, design verification and fabrication in accordance with European execution classes EXC2-EXC3.
• Welding Quality to ISO 3834 Standards: Zero-defect joining processes with qualified welding engineers and certified welders approved under WPS / WPQR.
• Advanced NDT Controls: Full factory inspection before site delivery through Ultrasonic (UT), Magnetic Particle (MT) and Penetrant (PT) tests.
• Design to Eurocode and AISC Standards: Full compliance with global codes in static and dynamic calculations for maximum seismic and load resistance.

engineeringDesign.title: Engineering & Design
engineeringDesign.description: From static calculations to 3D modelling, we design your projects with confidence
engineeringDesign.galleryDescription:
Flawless Design, Optimized Solutions

We combine our expertise in the steel structure industry with innovative engineering solutions and precise design processes. We handle every detail of your projects carefully and work with zero-error tolerance during fabrication and assembly stages.

Our Engineering and Design Capabilities:
• Static and Dynamic Analyses: Structural calculations in accordance with international codes such as Eurocode and AISC.
• 3D Modelling and Detailing: Modern 3D modelling processes that improve fabrication efficiency and assembly accuracy.
• Cost and Material Optimization: The most economical and efficient material management without compromising durability.
• Project-Specific Solutions: Flexible engineering approaches for every need, from industrial facilities to custom architectural structures.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Our completed and ongoing steel construction projects

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Expert guidance and engineering consulting for your projects
consulting.galleryDescription:
Raise Engineering Standards: Technical Supervision from Design to Assembly

We provide professional consulting solutions to keep your steel structure projects within budget, on schedule and, most importantly, compliant with international structural safety standards. With our engineering strength, we review and optimize every step of your project from a technical perspective.

• Standards and Project Management: Reviewing design and structural calculation processes for compliance with Eurocode, AISC and local regulations.
• Connection Detail Design: Optimizing bolted and welded connection details that directly affect structural safety for both site and fabrication conditions.
• Production and Quality Assurance: Coordinating factory fabrication in accordance with EN 1090 and ISO 3834 standards, material traceability and NDT testing.
• Site and Assembly Control: Supervising lifting, positioning and tightening operations of steel members on site in accordance with international assembly standards and occupational safety rules.

qualityControl.title: Quality Control
qualityControl.description: Rigorous quality control and assurance in every step
qualityControl.galleryDescription:
Flawless Inspection and Traceability at Every Stage of Production

Every steel component carrying the Stallcons signature goes through demanding testing and inspection processes before being shipped to site. Our Quality Assurance and Quality Control (QA/QC) system, built in accordance with international standards, consists of the following stages:

• Incoming Quality Control (Material Acceptance): Checking certificates of compliance (MTC 3.1) and geometric tolerances of all steel profiles, plates and consumables entering our facility against international standards such as EN and ASTM.
• Visual and Dimensional Control: Verifying full project compliance during cutting, drilling and fit-up stages, including weld preparation and assembly details through precise measurements.
• Welding Quality and WPS/WPQR Management: Ensuring all welding operations are performed by certified welders in accordance with approved welding procedure specifications (WPS / WPQR).
• Non-Destructive Testing (NDT): Verifying the structural integrity of welded joints through Ultrasonic (UT), Magnetic Particle (MT), Penetrant (PT) and Visual (VT) tests carried out by our own experts or independent third-party organizations.
• Surface Protection and Paint Quality Control: Measuring and reporting blasting quality (Sa 2.5 standard) and wet/dry film thicknesses (DFT) at micron level while tracking environmental conditions.
• Assembly and Torque Control: Inspecting site connections, bolt torque values and structural axes for compliance with assembly standards.

defense.title: Defense
defense.description: Specialized steel structures and solutions for the defense industry
defense.galleryDescription:
Certified Steel Solutions Against High Threat Levels

We manufacture maximum-security and high-precision steel components required by the defense industry in our facility with engineering accuracy and a zero-error philosophy. Our product and service groups developed to protect strategic facilities and personnel include:

• Ballistic Door and Access Systems: High-strength armored door systems designed for different threat and protection classes such as BR2-BR7 and STANAG, resistant to explosions and ballistic attacks.
• Weapon Loading-Unloading Stations: Indoor and outdoor safe loading-unloading stations equipped with ballistic steel and special damping materials, providing full protection against accidental discharge for military and law enforcement personnel.
• Armored Shelters and Living Areas: Steel construction and armor plate integration for modular military buildings, high-security guard posts and command-control centers.
• Fabrication Control to Military Standards: Documented quality assurance through compliance of all welding and joining processes with military standards, material traceability (MTC 3.1) and advanced laboratory tests (NDT).

craneSystems.title: Mining Equipment & Steel Structures
craneSystems.description: Heavy-duty mining equipment and infrastructure fabrication
craneSystems.galleryDescription:
Heavy-Duty Mining Equipment and Infrastructure Fabrication

High productivity and occupational safety in mining sites are only possible with steel structures produced through proper engineering. With Stallcons quality, our mining equipment and steel structure groups manufactured to withstand the harshest abrasion and impact conditions include:

• Crusher, Screening and Feeder Chassis: Heavy steel chassis reinforced with custom static analyses for facilities exposed to intense vibration and dynamic loads.
• Conveyor Galleries and Belt Systems: Steel conveyor lines and support towers that can safely span long distances while resisting outdoor conditions and corrosion.
• Silo, Bunker and Chute Fabrications: High-capacity storage and transfer units integrated with Hardox and similar wear plates for abrasive ore movement.
• Mining Plant Structural Steel: Corrosion-resistant, specially painted or galvanized multi-storey industrial steel buildings for flotation, leaching and enrichment plants.
• Traceable Quality in Compliance with Standards: 100% material traceability (MTC 3.1) for all equipment operating under extreme loads and precise NDT reporting for welded joints through ultrasonic and magnetic testing.
